text:
Created attachment 193853
Proposed patch (since 467563 revision)

Patch to update editors/focuswriter port from 1.6.12 to 1.6.13 version.

Look following links for changes:
https://github.com/gottcode/focuswriter/compare/v1.6.12...v1.6.13
https://github.com/gottcode/focuswriter/blob/v1.6.13/NEWS#L1-L10

The build was tested on FreeBSD 10.4 amd64.
